stemHtml: Two aircraft are following the same route at different levels one behind the other. Aircraft A is flying at a higher level than aircraft B. Both aircraft request descent due to heavy weather above. ATC gives aircraft A an instruction to (1) _____ and aircraft B an instruction to (2) _____.

options.a: (1) descend with an average descent rate; (2) descend with the maximum descend rate
options.b: (1) descend with maximum descent rate; (2) descend with the maximum descent rate
options.c: (1) descend with the minimum descent rate necessary to remain below the heavy weather; (2) descend with an average descent rate
options.d: (1) descend with the maximum descent rate; (2) descend with the minimum descent rate necessary to remain below the heavy weather
